prompt: Write a spec for adding a dark mode toggle to our settings page. It's one feature for the frontend team, should take about a sprint.
assertions: The skill recognises this as a single-feature scope and recommends /write-spec instead of /prd — producing a 10-section PRD for a settings toggle is over-engineering the documentation
If a PRD is produced anyway, it should explicitly note that a feature spec would be more appropriate for this scope
